## QA performed

## Tests

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Snapshot tests reviewed (no blind accepts)
- [ ] Maestro flows updated if user-facing
- [ ] Visual regression snapshots reviewed if Mushaf rendering changed

## Docs

- [ ] README updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] ADR added or updated if architectural
- [ ] CHANGELOG handled by conventional commit (release-please picks it up)
- [ ] Third-party notices updated if a new dep with notable license was added

## Privacy

- [ ] No new outbound network destinations introduced
- [ ] No verse/ayah/translation text added to logs, breadcrumbs, or Sentry events
- [ ] No analytics SDK added
- [ ] No PII collected

## Security

- [ ] No new permissions requested without justification
- [ ] No new deep-link routes introduced without param validation
- [ ] SSL pinning unaffected (or updated intentionally)
